digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.title: Digitally Sign First Page of a PDF
digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, configure a certificate, and add a visible digital signature to page one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multiple-digital-signatures-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Digital Signatures to PDF
add-multiple-digital-signatures-to-pdf.description: Shows how to apply two digital signatures on different pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, including certificate setup, optional appearance, and visible signature rectangles.

sign-pdf-with-custom-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Custom Appearance (Foreground Image & Background Color)
sign-pdf-with-custom-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF signature's custom appearance by setting a background color and drawing a foreground image, then applying a PKCS7 digital signature.

suppress-reason-location-in-pdf-signatur.title: Suppress Reason and Location in PDF Digital Signature
suppress-reason-location-in-pdf-signatur.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while clearing the Reason, Location, and ContactInfo fields by assigning empty strings before signing.

sign-pdf-french-caption.title: Digitally Sign PDF with French Caption Using SignatureCustomAppearance
sign-pdf-french-caption.description: Demonstrates how to apply a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF and set the signature caption language to French via the SignatureCustomAppearance locale settings.

remove-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Signature from PDF
remove-signature-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete an existing digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save the updated document.

verify-pdf-signature-by-name.title: Verify PDF Signature by Name
verify-pdf-signature-by-name.description: Demonstrates how to check whether a PDF contains a digital signature with a specific name (e.g., 'ContractSigner') and determine its validity using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

verify-manager-signature-in-pdf.title: Verify Manager Signature in PDF
verify-manager-signature-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document and verifying the cryptographic integrity of a specific signature field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature
extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, locate a specific signature field, extract its X.509 certificate, and save it as a .cer file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signature-field-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Field Image to PNG
extract-signature-field-image-to-png.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract the image of a signature field (e.g., 'WitnessSignature') using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, and save it as a PNG file.

custom-pdf-signature-appearance-no-capti.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Default Caption
custom-pdf-signature-appearance-no-capti.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while hiding the default "Digitally signed by" label by configuring PKCS1 signature properties and a custom appearance.

sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF file using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade, including a visible signature appearance.

remove-pdf-signature-missing-handling.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing Signature Handling
remove-pdf-signature-missing-handling.description: Demonstrates checking for a specific signature in a PDF and removing it using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, while gracefully handling the case when the signature does not exist.

verify-pdf-signatures-to-json.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Export Results to JSON
verify-pdf-signatures-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to verify each digital signature in a PDF and write a structured JSON report containing the signature names and validation status.

sign-pdf-with-reason-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason and Location using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-reason-location.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF document with a custom reason and location using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API.

add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF on a Specific Page
add-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature form field to a chosen page of a PDF using FormEditor, then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature with PdfFileSignature.

extract-certificate-details-from-signed-.title: Extract Certificate Details from Signed PDF
extract-certificate-details-from-signed-.description: Demonstrates how to read a digital signature from a PDF, extract the associated X509 certificate, and display its issuer and expiration date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

generate-pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
generate-pdf-signature-report.description: Demonstrates how to extract signature details from a PDF, verify each signature, and create a summary report as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-retry.title: Sign PDF with Retry on File Lock
sign-pdf-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a retry mechanism when the source file is locked by another process.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.title: Remove All Signatures from a PDF
remove-all-signatures-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to strip every digital signature from a PDF and save a clean copy.

verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.title: Verify Multiple PDF Signatures Using PdfFileSignature
verify-multiple-pdf-signatures.description: The example loads a signed PDF, retrieves all signature names, and verifies each signature using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

extract-signature-images-html-report.title: Extract Signature Images and Generate HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html-report.description: The example loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's visual image, converts it to a Base64 data URL, and embeds the images into an HTML file for visual inspection.

sign-pdf-semi-transparent-background.title: Sign PDF with Semi-Transparent Background Appearance
sign-pdf-semi-transparent-background.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and set a custom signature appearance with a semi‑transparent background color for improved readability.

list-signature-names-in-pdf.title: List Signature Names in a PDF
list-signature-names-in-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and retrieve all non‑empty signature names present in the document.

add-visible-image-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Visible Image Signature to PDF
add-visible-image-signature-to-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a visible image signature to a PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf Facade API in a console application.

sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and add a visible signature image positioned at the bottom‑right corner of the last page.

remove-existing-signatures-re-sign-pdf.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with New Certificate
remove-existing-signatures-re-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing signatures from a PDF and apply a new digital signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

verify-pdf-no-signatures-false.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
verify-pdf-no-signatures-false.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade to check that a PDF with no digital signatures returns false when calling VerifySigned.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs-recursiv.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs-recursiv.description: Demonstrates how to traverse a directory tree, load each PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, remove all embedded signatures, and save an unsigned copy.

extract-certificate-serial-number-from-p.title: Extract and Log Certificate Serial Number from PDF Signatures
extract-certificate-serial-number-from-p.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signatures, extract the associated X509 certificate, and log the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

list-pdf-signature-reason-location.title: List PDF Signature Reason and Location
list-pdf-signature-reason-location.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade, retrieve all signature names, and output each signature's reason and location for auditing.
